data_description.country: Public holidays and bridge days are calculated for this country.

subdivision.title: Choose region
subdivision.description: Some holidays in {country} differ per region. Pick a region or nationwide.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach fenstertage.com. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This country/region combination is already configured.

data.max_level: Maximum suggestion level (vacation days per block)

plan_bridge_day.name: Plan bridge day
plan_bridge_day.description: Marks one suggested bridge-day block as planned vacation.

config_entry_id.name: Entry
config_entry_id.description: The Fenstertage entry to plan against.

block_id.name: Block ID
block_id.description: The block_id from the sensor attributes.

plan_vacation.name: Plan vacation
plan_vacation.description: Plans a free date range as vacation. Weekends and holidays are excluded automatically.

config_entry_id.name: Entry
config_entry_id.description: The Fenstertage entry to plan against.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: The id of the planned item.

set_budget.name: Set budget
set_budget.description: Sets the vacation budget for one year.

days.name: Days
days.description: Vacation days available in that year.

invalid_range.message: End date must not be before start date.

range_too_long.message: Vacation ranges are limited to {max_days} days.

overlapping_vacation.message: The range overlaps an existing plan ({start} – {end}).

no_vacation_days.message: The range contains no workdays — nothing to plan.

unknown_block.message: No bridge-day block with id {block_id} in the loaded years.

unknown_entry.message: Unknown or not loaded Fenstertage entry: {entry_id}.

year_not_loaded.message: No holiday data loaded for {year}. Increase the preview years option.
